title: As mosquito ranges expand, better monitoring is key to preventing disease
summary: In Connecticut, for example, a statewide mosquito monitoring program has detected 54 different species, including invasives like the Asian tiger mosquito, which can transmit potentially serious diseases including dengue and Zika .
